name: personal-portfolio
description: Personal portfolio page for a software developer

scripts.test: node -e "var fs=require('fs');var h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');var ids=['site-shell','primary-nav','hero-section','feature-grid','primary-cta','mobile-nav-toggle','interactive-demo','footer-section'];var ok=true;ids.forEach(function(id){var found=h.indexOf('id=\"'+id+'\"')!==-1;console.log((found?'PASS':'FAIL')+': #'+id);if(!found)ok=false;});if(!ok){console.error('\nDOM target validation failed');process.exit(1);}console.log('\nAll '+ids.length+'/'+ids.length+' DOM targets verified.');"
